# Mapping between PTM positions and consensus sequence positions
# Format: PTM_Index	Alignment_Position	Consensus_Position	Consensus_AA
1	2	2	P
2	3	3	N
3	4	4	Q
4	6	6	I
5	9	9	T
6	42	42	I
7	47	47	I
8	49	49	H
9	56	56	Q
10	58	58	Q
11	59	59	I
12	62	62	C
13	64	64	Q
14	66	66	V
15	72	72	N
16	77	77	Q
17	80	80	V
18	83	83	I
19	85	85	N
20	86	86	T
21	88	88	F
22	101	101	G
23	103	103	S
24	118	118	N
25	161	161	G
26	168	168	P
27	180	180	V
28	183	183	P
29	185	185	N
30	216	216	A
31	250	250	G
32	280	280	S
33	287	287	N
34	322	322	Q
35	341	341	P
36	347	347	K
37	349	349	G
38	351	351	C
39	352	352	G
40	354	354	P
41	357	357	S
42	359	359	G
43	365	365	G
44	370	370	Y
45	383	383	S
46	387	387	G
47	399	399	G
48	403	403	N
49	404	404	F
50	408	408	Q
51	416	416	W
52	452	452	K
53	453	453	T
54	461	461	I
55	468	468	S
56	469	469	D
57	473	473	W
58	475	475	W
59	481	481	L
